data.title: Ezderm Opens API to Preferred Partners with Medsender Integration
data.description: Ezderm, a specialized EHR and practice management platform for dermatology, has recently released a new integration to streamline document routing and referrals. Through this integration, manual front-office processing can be reduced by as much as 80 percent, significantly improving efficiency. The company, based in Naples, Florida, unveiled this development on March 24, 2026. This advancement comes as Ezderm has made its once closed API accessible, allowing for easier integration and greater functionality for users.

data.title: ConceiveAbilities Launches 'Surrogacy Spark Series' Highlighting Why Women Become Surrogates
data.description: ConceiveAbilities, based in Chicago, marked Surrogacy Awareness Month by recognizing the extraordinary women who opt to be gestational surrogates. The Surrogacy Spark Series was introduced, showcasing over 20 women detailing their reasons for becoming surrogates. The program was launched on March 24, 2026.

data.title: Deka Lash Takes Aim at the Medical Aesthetics Industry With Launch of Deka+
data.description: A top lash franchise in North America is introducing injectables, AI-driven personalized treatment plans, and expanding to over 100 studios in the midst of a fragmented industry valued at $17 billion. This development was announced in Pittsburgh on March 24, 2026. The franchise has spent over ten years establishing itself as one of the fastest-growing brands in the region.

data.title: Lexon × Jeff Koons Unveil the Chromatic Collection: a Colorful New Chapter for the Acclaimed Balloon Dog Lamp and Balloon Dog Speaker
data.description: In Paris, the Lexon × Jeff Koons collaboration is evolving with the launch of the Chromatic Collection, following the success of the 2025 inaugural edition. This collection offers colorful updates to the Balloon Dog Lamp and Balloon Dog Speaker. Pre-orders for the eight new models will begin on March 24, 2026, exclusively on lexon-design.com, as part of a limited-time edition. These models retain the iconic translucent body that showcases the internal technology.

data.title: Acumatica 2026 R1 Strengthens Supply Chain Management for Manufacturers, Distributors, and Retailers
data.description: Acumatica, a leading cloud ERP provider for small and mid-sized businesses, has officially launched its latest product update, 2026 R1. This update includes the introduction of AI Studio, a suite of tools that empowers customers to develop and implement AI-driven workflows securely. Additionally, users will have early access to Acumatica’s AI Assistant before its full release later in the year. Specifically designed for manufacturers, distributors, and retailers, this update is set to revolutionize how businesses utilize AI technology to enhance their operations.

data.title: U.S. Hospitality Shows Cautious Readiness Ahead of 2026 World Cup, OysterLink Study Finds
data.description: Projections for hotel demand continue to show a conservative outlook as operators adapt their strategies and address ongoing workforce issues in anticipation of a major global event. As the countdown to the 2026 FIFA World Cup begins with less than 100 days left, the U.S. hospitality sector is actively gearing up for the event.

data.title: McGinnis Lochridge Welcomes Veteran Litigator David Herrold as Partner in Dallas Office
data.description: In Dallas on March 24, 2026, seasoned trial attorney David Herrold, boasting over 30 years of experience handling intricate commercial disputes, has become a partner at McGinnis Lochridge's Dallas office. His addition enhances the firm's impressive litigation team.

data.title: whiskerDocs Data Shows Employers Turn to Veterinary Virtual Care as Demands for Pet Benefits Surge
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in Chicago, there has been a rise in the popularity of high-impact pet solutions. Employers are now incorporating virtual care options into their benefit packages to meet this demand. Among these, pet telehealth stands out as the fastest-growing service. This innovative offering grants access to veterinary professionals around the clock, catering to the needs of pet owners. This shift indicates a significant trend towards prioritizing pet well-being, with a growing emphasis on remote solutions in the pet care sector.

data.title: RS and HMS Networks enable smart oil and gas operations
data.description: RS is now offering industrial networking solutions from HMS Networks' Red Lion brand, catering to the oil and gas sector. These solutions ensure real-time telemetry, robust connectivity, and environmental durability at all stages of the operations value chain. The announcement was made in Fort Worth, Texas, on March 24, 2026.

data.title: Survey Finds Cooking Oil Influences Where Americans Choose to Eat
data.description: Fresh data has surfaced indicating the significance of the type of cooking oil used, causing a shift in dining preferences across America. This shift is primarily being driven by a generational gap. Recently released numbers reveal that Coast Packing Company, a prominent supplier of animal fat shortenings in the Western region, is at the forefront of this trend. The data was made public from VERNON, California on March 24, 2026.

data.title: Banking Spent Four Years Buying Technology. Customer Satisfaction Fell Anyway.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, the American banking industry is experiencing significant changes. Investment in digital banking has surged, almost quadrupling from 2021 to 2023. Despite this, customer satisfaction with these digital platforms has decreased. The number of FDIC-insured banks has declined by over 50% since 2000, dropping from almost 10,000 to under 4,600. This reduction has led to intensified competition among a smaller number of institutions for the same customer base. While numerous banking tools have been introduced, the core issue of customer frustration remains unchanged.

data.title: Inner Haven Wellness Announces Launch of Virtual Adolescent Eating Disorder Programming This Spring
data.description: Inner Haven Wellness, based in Madison, Wisconsin, is launching new virtual Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP) and Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP) tailored for adolescents. The programs will provide flexible treatment in the afternoons and early evenings, aiming to assist teens in maintaining engagement in school. Scheduled to commence on March 24, 2026, these services are designed to support teenagers dealing with eating disorders.

data.title: The Hackett Group® Study Finds GBS Leaders Betting on AI to Close Widening Productivity Gap
data.description: Miami, (BUSINESS WIRE) - The Hackett Group, Inc. disclosed data from its 2026 Global Business Services (GBS) Key Issues Study, indicating that GBS entities are swiftly adopting AI to combat intense productivity challenges. This leading Gen AI consultancy and enterprise digital transformation firm's study shows that initial AI implementations are producing tangible improvements in service quality, customer experience, and employee engagement. The research reveals that GBS organizations are facing an increasing workload as they prioritize AI integration to drive efficiency. Hackett Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HCKT) is at the forefront of assisting companies in navigating these transformations.

data.title: CEC Facilities Secures 379,009 SF Industrial Lease in Grand Prairie, Texas
data.description: Davidson Bogel Real Estate (DB2RE) has revealed that CEC Facilities ("CEC") has signed a lease for 379,009 square feet at 2051 MacArthur Boulevard in Grand Prairie, Texas. This move establishes a more extensive prefabrication and modular manufacturing hub for CEC to bolster the growth of its mission-critical and large-scale industrial infrastructure business. The facility represents a vital step in expanding CEC's Integrated Modular Solutions platform.

data.title: ISG Secures Third Patent in AI-Powered Contract Technology
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, ISG has successfully obtained a U.S. patent for an advanced computational engine designed to manage conflicting interests and facilitate the negotiation of contract terms.

data.title: miraDry® Reports Strong 2025 Growth, Outpacing Aesthetic Energy-Based Device Category and Recognizing Top Providers Across North America
data.description: In San Jose, California on March 24, 2026, miraDry, Inc., a prominent leader in non-invasive sweat and odor reduction, reported significant growth in 2025. The company highlighted top-performing provider partners in North America for their exceptional patient support. This growth signifies a promising future for miraDry, Inc., with a notable increase in their market presence.

data.title: Q2 Announces Partnership With Stablecore to Provide Banks and Credit Unions With Stablecoins and Digital Asset Capabilities
data.description: Based in Austin, Texas, Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: QTWO) has revealed a new partnership with Stablecore, a digital asset platform specializing in providing stablecoins, tokenized deposits, and other digital asset products for banks and credit unions. This collaboration aims to offer financial institutions a simplified process to adopt innovative digital asset services through a reliable integration. This move signifies Q2 Holdings' dedication to facilitating the evolution of financial services by teaming up with Stablecore to introduce cutting-edge digital asset solutions within the industry.

data.title: Michter's Distillery to Release 2026 Edition of Two Legacy Series Whiskeys: Shenk's Homestead & Bomberger's Declaration
data.description: Louisville, Kentucky - On March 24, 2026, Michter's Distillery from Louisville announced the upcoming release of its 2026 Shenk's Homestead Kentucky Sour Mash Whiskey and 2026 Bomberger's Declaration Kentucky Straight Bourbon in April. These exclusive whiskeys will have limited availability in the market.

data.title: Insurity Expands Strategic Partnership with EuroTempest to Deliver Enhanced Windstorm and Event Intelligence Through SpatialKey
data.description: EuroTempest has announced the expansion of its collaboration with Insurity to offer its windstorm hazard models and event response datasets on SpatialKey platform. This move will enhance access to critical information for businesses operating in areas prone to wind-related disasters. The partnership aims to provide valuable insights and data to help companies better prepare and respond to potential windstorm events. This expansion will significantly benefit users by integrating essential windstorm hazard models and event response datasets into the SpatialKey platform.

data.title: Stellar Snacks Announces Strategic Growth Investment from Main Post Partners
data.description: A collaboration has been formed to increase the distribution, production capacity, and innovation of a popular better-for-you snack brand. On March 24, 2026, in Carson City, Nevada, Stellar Snacks, renowned for its tasty pretzel products, shared plans to expand. This partnership aims to boost the brand's footprint, with a focus on healthier snacks, by increasing distribution channels. Additionally, there will be a significant increase in production capacity to meet growing demand. Furthermore, investments in innovation are on the horizon to introduce new and exciting products to the market.
